positive: A minimalist, symmetrical, single-line continuous drawing depicting a forest of stylized tropical plants, intermingling with abstract celestial elements like crescent moons and shooting stars. The style should be sophisticated, modern vector art with high contrast black ink on a clean white background. Focus on clean, scalable silhouettes and elegant, flowing curved lines. The composition must be centered, creating an all-over, repeating pattern aesthetic. Use negative space effectively. Ultra-detailed, engraved aesthetic, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, noisy, duplicate, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grain
